ogTitle: Belfrayden vs Belimbla Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Belfrayden and Belimbla Park.
heading: Belfrayden vs Belimbla Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Belfrayden, New South Wales and Belimbla Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Belfrayden has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Belimbla Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Belfrayden or Belimbla Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Belfrayden has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Belimbla Park scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Belfrayden scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Belimbla Park scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Belfrayden or Belimbla Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Belfrayden has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
